hints.question: Hint
hints.answer: Start with an empty list and an empty string for building each word

hints.question: Hint
hints.answer: Use a for-each loop to iterate through each character in the sentence

hints.question: Hint
hints.answer: When you hit a space, push the current word to the list (if it's not empty) and reset the word

hints.question: Hint
hints.answer: Skip periods entirely - don't add them to the current word

hints.question: Hint
hints.answer: Don't forget to push the last word after the loop ends
